title: old flow preview payment result
implemented: Rebuilt preview WXML/WXSS as a page-specific old-flow replica with three visible modules, locked content, and 1 yuan complete-basic CTA.
Rebuilt basic-pay WXML/WXSS as a confirmation/payment screen with header, three-step progress, preview list, locked rows, and local 1 yuan CTA.
Rebuilt basic-result WXML/WXSS as a complete basic decision result with summary, quality/object metadata, loss points, weaknesses, advice, 9.9 full-unlock CTA, and local reports navigation.
Bound visible basic-pay back control to the preview route and basic-result secondary control to the reports route in the miniapp Page replica config.

verification.reason: Repository test runner treats multiple selectors as an AND match and has no single group tagged with all three selectors.

verification.command: npm run visual:scoremap -- preview basic-pay basic-result
verification.reason: The local visual harness writes deterministic structural artifacts and does not claim live miniapp pixel-perfect PASS.

knownLimitations: Pure PASS is not claimed because the exact combined npm test selector is incompatible with the current test runner grouping.
Visual verification remains PASS_NEEDS_MANUAL_UI_REVIEW because this harness does not run a live WeChat raster pixelmatch.
